utility_evaluation.REASONING: There are 5 items in the required format: health_coverage, property_coverage, travel_coverage, additional_services, total_budget. All 5 items appear in the final coverage plan. Now check if each is fully specified with costs: 1) health_coverage: requires physical and mental health insurance with costs. The plan lists two sub-items with plan names and explicit monthly costs (€100 and €60) plus details—fully specified. 2) property_coverage: requires home/contents insurance with costs. The plan provides 'home_contents' with plan name, cost (€55/month), and coverage limit—fully specified. 3) travel_coverage: requires travel insurance with costs. The plan provides a comprehensive travel plan with cost (€50/month) and detailed inclusions—fully specified. 4) additional_services: requires any enhancement services with costs. The plan lists services but does not specify explicit costs for these services (e.g., 24/7 support, telemedicine, gym reimbursement up to €50/month is mentioned, but it's unclear whether this cost is included in premiums or an external service cost; however, since 'with costs' is requested, the absence of distinct costs for these services makes this item not fully specified). 5) total_budget: requires complete monthly/annual cost breakdown. The plan includes monthly total, annual total, and comparative savings—fully specified. Therefore, 4 out of 5 items are fully specified according to the required details.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: We need to match each item in the finalized plan to the exact item names present in the ground-truth ratings. The plan includes: Physical health: LifeFirst Standard Plan; Mental health: InsurePlus Standard Plan; Home contents: Current SafeGuard Standard (this exact item does not exist in ground-truth; the closest category is property_protection->home_content where available options are e.g., LifeFirst Standard Coverage, InsurePlus Standard Coverage, HomeFirst Standard Coverage, etc. Since 'Current SafeGuard Standard' is not listed, there is no corresponding rating to map. Travel insurance: InsurePlus Standard Plan. Additional services are generic and not separate rated items in the ground truth. Therefore, we map the three identifiable items that have exact matches: 'LifeFirst Standard Plan' for physical health (rating 9 under primary_health_coverage.physical_health), 'InsurePlus Standard Plan' for mental health (rating 8 under primary_health_coverage.mental_health), and 'InsurePlus Standard Plan' for travel insurance (rating 10 under mobility_coverage.travel_insurance). The home contents item has no exact match, so it is omitted from RATINGS.
